title: ERD Expand and Contract View Toggle
story: As a DataTools Pro user viewing an ERD, I want to expand or contract entity nodes to toggle between a high-level conceptual view and a detailed field-level view, so that I can control the level of detail displayed.
description:
## Context
When many objects are displayed, showing all primary and foreign key fields makes the ERD cluttered. Users need to toggle between a conceptual view (object names only) and a detailed view (with key fields).

## Behavior
A toolbar button toggles all entity nodes between:
- **Contracted** — shows only the object name for a high-level conceptual overview
- **Expanded** — shows primary and foreign key fields within each node

The toggle applies globally to all nodes in the current diagram.
acceptance_criteria: A toggle button is present in the top toolbar
Contracted view shows only object names without field details
Expanded view shows primary and foreign key fields within each node
Toggle switches all nodes simultaneously without page reload
Relationship lines remain visible in both views
ux_changes: New expand/contract toolbar button toggles ERD nodes between conceptual (name-only) and detailed (with key fields) views.
implementation_notes: GoJS node templates support collapsible sections for field lists. Toggle state is managed client-side.
